creator: jon@xyinn.org
text: Right, as I stated before, if I use ntpdate, it will work, but my issue is that in the documentation, it states that ntpdate will be deprecated because we already have ntpd -g. So I'm trying not to use ntpdate and migrate away from it earlier so that I'm safe in the future. However, I'm running into the current issues which would happen in the future once ntpdate gets removed.
